description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal drum with a matte black finish and three horizontal reinforcement bands encircling its body. The top surface features splashes and drips of bright green liquid, suggesting the presence of hazardous or radioactive material inside. A yellow and black warning sign with a radiation symbol is affixed to the side, clearly indicating the dangerous contents. The drum appears industrial, with minor wear and scuff marks visible along the edges and bands. The overall construction is robust, designed to contain and transport hazardous substances securely. The absence of visible valves or access ladders suggests it is a sealed storage unit.
description: A black cylindrical metal drum with green radioactive liquid stains and a prominent radiation warning sign, designed for hazardous material storage.
description_view_0: The drum is shown with the radiation warning sign clearly visible and some green liquid stains on the top edge.
description_view_1: This view highlights a large green liquid drip running down the front, with the warning sign partially visible.
description_view_2: The side of the drum is shown with no visible signage or stains, emphasizing the plain black surface and metal bands.
description_view_3: The top of the drum is visible with a pool of green liquid and no warning sign in view.
